items.title: [负面] I'm buying into this game early; right now I have ...
items.summary:
I'm buying into this game early; right now I have a lot of issues with it but I think in a year or so this will be one of the best roguelikes out there. 

If I had the ear of the devs I'd ask them to fix the sloppy translations, fix the server lag and make the main menu a little more easy to navigate. Once those things are done I think this game will be able to shine.

items.title: [正面] 畫風很棒,角色設計都很有巧思,劇情也很不錯,平時很少看劇情的我竟然看得下去,還會為了看劇情拚命打下一...
items.summary:
畫風很棒,角色設計都很有巧思,劇情也很不錯,平時很少看劇情的我竟然看得下去,還會為了看劇情拚命打下一關
抽角色也很佛,新手入坑抽數給很多,我玩不到一個月除了限定角色要等復刻大部分角色都拿到了(也可能是我運氣好),目前無課已經抽了九百多抽 :D

最後最後,[b] 戈利亞 好 [/b]

items.title: [正面] There's a super large power creep, grinding takes ...
items.summary:
There's a super large power creep, grinding takes a special resource that regens over time or can be purchased (because just like every other gatcha game of course it can be)

not very ftp friendly in many regards but it still is overall quite enjoyable in the card battler aspect, plus you know.. lovecraftian/eldritch inspiration is a huge plus.  dont care for the chat gpt translations though, can be frequently buggy.  Even so, its still fun to play, definitely do not reccomend sinking money into the game, the pull system is extremely biased towards rewarding things you dont need vs actually getting characters, which is extremely frustrating.

items.title: [正面] Es entretenido y si te gusta el misterio sera para...
items.summary: Es entretenido y si te gusta el misterio sera para ti.
